lines.speaker: Dodgy geezer
lines.text: Lookin' fer the Corsair cabin boy?

lines.speaker: Dodgy geezer
lines.text: Arr, I can help ye with yer business wi'out ye needin' to known mine. So are ye seekin' him, or not?

lines.speaker: Dodgy geezer
lines.text: The Corsairs moor their ship away to the west, beyond yon village of Rimmington. Ye should look fer him there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why would I be looking for him?

lines.speaker: Dodgy geezer
lines.text: Many come here seekin' him. They be all lost an 'confused. If ye be seekin' him now, maybe I can help ye.

lines.speaker: Dodgy geezer
lines.text: Arrr, I thought maybe ye were.
